name: ccc-operations
description: CCC internal operations toolkit. Four skills: CCC SOP Creator (HEROIC-format SOPs for any repeatable business process), Skill Creator Pro (full engineering loop for Claude skills and plugins), Framework Extractor (turns books and courses into structured skills and SOPs), and Marketplace Health Check (compliance scan across all marketplace plugins and skills). Use these skills to build, improve, and maintain CCC's own systems.
